who: fleet managers in logistics companies managing 10-50 vehicles
offer: For fleet managers in logistics companies processing 10-50 vehicles, inefficient reporting causes increased operational costs. We automate weekly vehicle usage and fuel consumption reports instead of manual reporting processes using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient reporting on vehicle usage and fuel consumption
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to fleet managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates for 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vehicle data
